headlines.headline: Plevep Power reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 7% indicates strong operational performance and market demand.

headlines.headline: Jovor Networks sees 8% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% margin improvement directly enhances profitability and is a strong positive signal for financial health.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
